violations.text: The food-contact surfaces of equipment and utensils were not sanitized. The required utensil surface temperature of 160 degrees Fahrenheit (rinse temperature 180 degrees F) was not achieved during the sanitizing cycle of both bar dishwashers as evidenced by the failure of the thermolabel (temperature indicator) affixed to the surface of a utensil to turn black. Service call has been placed. All paper products are to be used until dishwashers are serviced and correct sanitizing temperature is being reached. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
Spray bottles used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the sanitizing solution for the 3-bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dishwashers. New Violation. Correct By: 06/10/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the walk-in ventilation fan grates have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025
